description:
15 languages. Same concept. One screen. 💻 See how syntax differs instantly. ⚡

Compare programming syntax languages side by side — one concept shown across fifteen languages in a single grid with full Prism syntax highlighting. No tab-switching, no searching: the Learning Hub puts every answer on one screen so cross-language pattern recognition clicks faster.

🎯 What you'll learn
- How the Syntax Comparison grid lets you pick any concept and see it across all fifteen languages at once
- How Language Insights gives each language a full strategic profile — typing discipline, compilation model, AI-era positioning
- How Select All / Deselect All drives a plain string array that updates both checkboxes and the comparison grid simultaneously
- How `useMemo` keeps the filtered snippets re-render flat even when all fifteen languages are selected
- How Frameworks, Libraries, Stacks, and the Technology Map extend the hub beyond syntax into full ecosystem coverage


🔗 Links
Source code:  https://coding-fab.com/product/learning-hub-react-typescript-syntax-explorer-starter-kit/

Learning a second language gets easier when you can compare programming syntax languages on a single screen rather than hunting across fifteen browser tabs. The Learning Hub is a React and TypeScript single-page app built with Vite that covers core concepts — hello world through error handling — across Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, C#, C++, Swift, Kotlin, PHP, Dart, C, Ruby, and R. Every section loads instantly from the sidebar: Language Insights, Syntax, Comparison, Frameworks, Libraries, Stacks, and the Technology Map. Fork it locally and use it the next time syntax trips you up.

#coding #programming #learntocode
#programming #learntocode #syntaxcomparison #reactjs #codingfab
#Shorts
fulltitle: 15 Languages, One Concept — Instant Side-by-Side Syntax #Shorts #programming #coding
